title: Exposing the signal layer behind market narratives
author: topicspace
selftext:
Exposed the raw signal layer behind the Narrative Compass.

Structured narratives → underlying events → source links.

Useful if you want to inspect how narratives actually form (or don’t).

[https://topicspace.com/signals](https://topicspace.com/signals)

MACHINE ACCESS

Daily JSON feeds are available at stable public URLs:  
  
/signals/ai/latest.json  
/signals/crypto/latest.json  
/signals/ai/2026-03-24.json

[view the schema](https://topicspace.com/signals/schema.json)
